VERDICT: GENUINE  
ROUND: NONE  
REASONING: Checked many independent spots:  
• L0069-L0076 – verified ROTR results, step-by-step additions in round 0 (e.g. h(0x5BE0CD19)+S1(0x3587272B)=0x9167F444 -> L0072).  
• L0084-L0087 – round 1: S1 and step1/step2 additions (h 0x1F83D9AB + S1 0xFF8ED6E9 = 0x1F12B094 → L0086, plus ch addition → L0087) correct.  
• Cross-checked K-constants against standard list at many indices (L0152 K[6]=0x923F82A4, L0166 K[7]=0xAB1C5ED5, L0601 K[38]=0x81C2C92E, L0615 K[39]=0x92722C85, L0629 K[40]=0xA2BFE8A1 etc.) – all match.  
• Verified several later arithmetic lines: round 10 step chain (L0210-L0215), round 20 (L0349-L0356), round 38 (L0601-L0607) – each internal sum reproduces the given value.  
• No disagreement found; if one bit had been flipped, at least one of these independently-recomputed values would differ.
